name: chrY_Yq12_heterochromatin_DYZ1_DYZ2
description: Yq12 heterochromatic block, ~30-40 Mb of tandem satellite DNA (DYZ1: ~3000 copies of 3.4 kb pentanucleotide; DYZ2: 2440 copies of 2.4 kb AT-rich repeat). Highly variable in size between males (Y chromosome heteromorphism, q12 polymorphism). Almost no genes; entirely SD/satellite architecture. Telomeric end at PAR2.

architecture.internal_structure: DYZ1 pentanucleotide tandem array, DYZ2 alpha-like array, DYZ17, DYZ18 intermixed; massive structural heteromorphism between males.

related_diseases: rare Yq12 deletions extending into AZFc
